summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture; the set shines with a uniquely brilliant Casey Jones and a beautiful He Was a Friend of Mine.
review: All three reviewers rave about this recording’s pristine, instrument‑and‑vocal clarity thanks to Charlie Miller’s superb soundboard work. Musically the show is highlighted by an unusual, standout rendition of Casey Jones that leads into a gorgeous performance of He Was a Friend of Mine, making it one of the strongest shows from that era.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star reviews praising both performance and audio quality; no criticisms were noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Sound is described as great, crystal‑clear, with every instrument and voice audible; no technical flaws mentioned.

standout_songs: He Was a Friend of Mine
show_quality.setlist_flow: The set maintains high energy throughout, with a unique treatment of Casey Jones that serves as an excellent warm‑up before the beautiful He Was a Friend of Mine, keeping momentum strong.
